properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v4 v2 v5 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You’re not aimless In the valley There’s adventure in the lines And in between It’s not just existence A simple story You dust me off and Pull me back up on my feet Now I’m walking with The God who walks with me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Spirit be my compass, Oh Spirit guide me home You know the only way to The place where I belong Though I’ve been prone to wander You’ve never been too far So Spirit be my compass Back to the Father’s heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Though I’ve felt faithless I won’t be discouraged There’s a purpose For what feels like wondering And I’m still learnin’ That one thing’s for certain You are greater than my heart’s humanity Oh I’m walking with The God who walks with me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So show me the way Show me the way Show me the way Back to the Father’s Heart Show me the way Show me the way Show me the way Back to the Father’s Heart

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So Spirit be my compass Back to the Father’s heart
